title: Learning to Live Together: The Return of Mad Dogs & Englishmen
original_title: Learning to Live Together: The Return of Mad Dogs & Englishmen
overview: A documentary telling the story of Joe Cocker's historic "Mad Dogs and Englishmen" tour through the lens of the Tedeschi Trucks Band's reunion of the Mad Dogs.
